# Bubbles Enterprise Soffit & Fascia — Orlando, FL

> Expert soffit and fascia installation, repair, and replacement in Orlando and Central Florida.
> Licensed and insured. Serving residential and new construction since 2020.
> Phone: (407) 715-1790. Available Mon–Sat 8am–6pm. Emergency repairs available.
> Service area: Orlando, Kissimmee, Winter Park, Winter Garden, Clermont, Sanford, Oviedo,
> Lake Mary, Apopka, Altamonte Springs, Maitland, Casselberry, Longwood, Celebration,
> St. Cloud, and 45+ Central Florida cities.

## Services
- [Soffit & Fascia Repair](https://bubblesenterprise.com/repairs): Repair holes, rotted wood, animal damage, storm damage to existing soffit and fascia
- [Remove & Replace](https://bubblesenterprise.com/remove-replace): Full soffit and fascia removal and replacement with aluminum or vinyl
- [New Construction](https://bubblesenterprise.com/new-construction): Builder-grade soffit and fascia installation for new homes and developments
- [Emergency Repair](https://bubblesenterprise.com/contact/emergency): Same-day response for urgent soffit issues — animal intrusion, storm damage, open holes

## Pricing
- [Free Estimate Calculator](https://bubblesenterprise.com/calculator): Instant price estimate — enter linear feet and overhang width to get a project total
- [Materials Guide](https://bubblesenterprise.com/materials): Aluminum vs vinyl soffit comparison — durability, lifespan, and which to choose

## Fascia
- [Fascia Repair Orlando](https://bubblesenterprise.com/fascia-repair-orlando): Expert fascia repair and replacement in Orlando, FL — rotted boards, gutter damage, water damage. Free on-site estimate.

## Materials
- [Materials Guide](https://bubblesenterprise.com/materials): Aluminum vs vinyl soffit — full comparison, lifespan, hurricane rating, cost difference, and which to choose for Florida
- [Aluminum Soffit](https://bubblesenterprise.com/materials/aluminum): Fire-resistant, hurricane-rated aluminum soffit — 20-30 year lifespan, 10 colors, non-combustible. The professional standard for Florida.
- [Vinyl Soffit](https://bubblesenterprise.com/materials/vinyl): Cost-effective vinyl soffit — 15-20 year lifespan, wider color variety. Good for shaded locations and budget projects.

## Blog — Expert Guides
- [How to Tell if Your Soffit is Damaged](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/how-to-tell-if-soffit-is-damaged): 7 warning signs of soffit damage. Visual inspection checklist for Florida homeowners.
- [Aluminum vs Vinyl Soffit: 2026 Comparison](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/aluminum-vs-vinyl-soffit): Side-by-side comparison for Florida homes — cost, lifespan, hurricane resistance, heat tolerance.
- [How Long Does Soffit Last? Lifespan by Material](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/soffit-lifespan-by-material): Aluminum: 20-30 yrs. Vinyl: 15-20 yrs. Wood: 5-15 yrs. Florida-specific data with climate factors.
- [Animals in Damaged Soffit — Orlando Guide](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/animals-in-damaged-soffit-orlando): Raccoons, squirrels, roof rats, bats, and wasps. Identification guide and the only permanent fix.
- [Soffit vs Fascia: What's the Difference?](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/soffit-vs-fascia-difference): Plain English explanation — what each part does and why both matter for your home.
- [Soffit & Fascia Color Trends 2026](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/soffit-fascia-color-trends-2026): Gray is out. Greige is in. Dark fascia accents trending for 2026 Florida homes.
- [Termites in Soffit Orlando](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/termites-in-soffit-orlando): Drywood termites target soffit and fascia. Identification guide, frass signs, and repair after treatment.
- [Hurricane-Proof Soffit Florida](https://bubblesenterprise.com/blog/hurricane-proof-soffit-florida): Wind ratings by material, the 4 failure modes, and what Florida building code requires for soffit.
